_profile_label: REPLACE — e.g. 'Senior Dev — Permissive' or 'Contractor — Restricted'
_description: Role profile. Merged ON TOP of settings.base.json at session start. Use empty arrays for a permissive role (the base deny list + security hook are the safety net); fill deny/ask to restrict.
_how_to_use: Claude Code loads .claude/settings.json (base). A profile selector (e.g. a `make settings` target or check-profile.sh) symlinks/copies the chosen settings.<name>.json over settings.local.json. Keep base immutable; vary only the profile.

permissions._permissive_example: A trusted role can leave all three arrays empty and rely on base deny + security-check.sh hook.
_restricted_example_deny: Examples to copy into deny[] for a restricted role:
_restricted_example_ask: Examples to copy into ask[] (prompt before running) for a restricted role:
permissions._restricted_only: Add "disableBypassPermissionsMode": "disable" for the most locked-down roles.
